description: A black-and-white photograph (no graphic overlay or text) of a very large American flag hanging vertically from the ceiling girders inside an automobile manufacturing plant, posted by the Department of Labor with the caption 'Our mission is unchanged: AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!'. The flag's blue star field and stripes are positioned at the left-center of the frame. The setting is an industrial assembly hall with exposed steel roof trusses, hanging lights, and rows of pickup trucks/SUVs and machinery on the factory floor receding into the background. The photo is monochrome and high-contrast. The image carries no on-image typography, slogan, agency seal, or composed graphic layout.
notable_text: No on-image text. Tweet caption: 'Our mission is unchanged: AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST!'
